reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo ahí y los que atienden son muy serviciales y atentos. Se puede inflar las goma del auto con un dispositivo que te permite, a través de un brazo mecanico, cargar aire en las 4 gomas sin hacer esfuerzo y sin ensuciarte, es muy bueno.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there, and the staff are very helpful and attentive. They have a device that inflates all four tires with a mechanical arm, allowing you to do so effortlessly and without getting dirty. It's excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlNjczcVVREAE

reviews.comment:

Todo bien, te atienden bárbaro, los playeros te ayudan con cualquier problema que tengas desde aire agua o aceite, el unico problema, es que hay pocos surtidores y se arman largas filas sobre Martín García de espera.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is great, the service is excellent, the attendants help you with any problem you have, from air, water or oil, the only problem is that there are few pumps and long lines form on Martín García while waiting.

reviews.comment:
Uno de los playeros me quiso dar cátedra de responsabilidad sanitaria pública y con el puño cerrado me dijo que me vaya y que no vuelva. Una locura el nivel de psicosis que llegamos en esta sociedad donde uno no puede decir lo que siente libremente y con respeto porque alguno se incomode. Que poca tolerancia.

(Translated by Google)
One of the beach attendants tried to lecture me on public health responsibility, shaking his fist and telling me to leave and never come back. It's insane how paranoid we are in this society, where you can't even express your feelings freely and respectfully for fear of offending someone. Such intolerance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1Ni0yWWdRRRAB
